name: Neon Optimizer
long_text:
Neon Optimizer is a native Win32 application designed to maximize system interrupts and clear registry bloat. Built in 2013, it uses legacy hardware calls to ensure 0ms latency in background processing.

Key Features:
- RAM Compression
- Registry Defrag
- Startup Boost

name: Weather KitKat
long_text:
Experience the classic weather interface of the KitKat era. This app provides hyper-local forecasts and beautiful 4x2 glossy widgets for your home screen.

Changes in v1.4:
- Fixed location bug
- New high-res icons
